data.title: Iambic to Participate in April Investor Conferences
data.description: Iambic, a clinical-stage company focused on developing innovative medicines through its AI-powered drug discovery and development platform, will be participating in several investor conferences. These include the Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference from April 13-16, Bernstein’s Best of Biotech Symposium on April 15, and Citi’s 4th Annual AI Summit scheduled for April 15-16. Dr. Tom Miller, Co-Founder and CEO of Iambic, will be presenting the company at the Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference.

data.title: Aptive Pest Control Forecasts One of the Busiest Pest Seasons in Years
data.description: In Provo, Utah, Aptive Pest Control is preparing for a potentially active pest season this spring due to a warmer-than-average winter in many parts of the United States. Utilizing data from the Aptive Pest Activity Index™, which examines millions of pest data points including neighborhood trends, migration patterns, and weather changes, the company aims to assist homeowners in preventing pest infestations. The 2026 Spring Pest Intelligence Report, based on this index and proprietary data models, offers insights to help homeowners proactively address pest issues.

data.title: Charles Schwab Foundation Commits $2 Million to Expand Access to Financial Education Through New Schwab Moneywise Momentum Grants
data.description: In Westlake, Texas, Charles Schwab Foundation has introduced a new grant program during Financial Literacy Month to promote practical money skills. The Schwab Moneywise Momentum Grants program will provide up to $2 million this year to nonprofit organizations focusing on innovative solutions for advancing financial literacy. The initiative aims to support fresh thinking and unique approaches in expanding financial education.

data.title: Xeriant Receives U.S. Patent Notice Allowance for its Breakthrough Fire-Resistant Composite Technology
data.description: Xeriant (OTCQB: XERI) has been granted a Notice of Allowance by the USPTO for its exclusive multilayered fire-resistant composite material and the process for creating it.

data.title: New Research: As America approaches its 250th anniversary, a powerful "Unity Mandate" is emerging for brands to bridge divides
data.description: New research from M Booth reveals that as the United States nears its 250th anniversary, Americans trust brands over politicians to provide leadership, with Gen Z standing out as the most optimistic group. The study shows that a significant number of Americans are looking to brands to fill the void in leadership. This indicates a shift in trust towards corporations rather than traditional political figures. Gen Z, in particular, emerges as the most hopeful demographic, showcasing a positive outlook on the future. This trend highlights a changing landscape in terms of where Americans place their confidence and hope for leadership, marking a potential transformation in societal attitudes towards authorities.

data.title: FOREX Goes Live with Diebold Nixdorf's Branch Automation Solutions for End-to-End ATM Management
data.description: In the state of North Canton, Ohio, on April 2, 2026, Diebold Nixdorf (NYSE: DBD), a renowned company in revolutionizing the banking and shopping experience globally, introduced a groundbreaking solution for financial institutions. This innovative offering provides a reliable single partner for financial institutions to effectively manage their entire ATM network. This solution ensures the security, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness of the ATM channel. By partnering with Diebold Nixdorf, financial institutions can streamline their operations and maximize their financial resources.

data.title: As US Regulators Move to Define AI Rules for Consumer Services, Nearly 60% of Americans Fear Losing Control of Over Money While 44% Expect AI to Take Over Payments, Aevi Data Shows
data.description: In London on April 2, 2026, it was reported that U.S. regulators are working on providing additional advice regarding the usage of artificial intelligence in consumer services like payments. A recent study by payment platform Aevi unveiled that 59% of Americans are apprehensive about losing autonomy concerning the timing and method of payments.

data.title: ESOP LEADER GREATBANC WELCOMES HAYDEE CALDERO
data.description: In Chicago on April 2, 2026, it was reported that GreatBanc Trust Company, a national ESOP trustee, welcomed Haydee "I-They" Caldero as their new Vice President and Client Service Officer. In this role, Caldero will oversee client relationships and offer strategic guidance.

data.title: Academy Sports + Outdoors Announces Participation in Upcoming Investor Conference
data.description: KATY, TX - In a recent announcement, Academy Sports + Outdoors, a prominent sports and outdoor retailer (Nasdaq: ASO), revealed its involvement in the forthcoming J.P. Morgan Retail Roundup Conference. This conference is anticipated to be a key event for the Company.

data.title: Ornn Compute Price Index Added to Bloomberg Terminal
data.description: Ornn AI Inc. revealed today that the Ornn Compute Price Index (OCPI) is now accessible on the Bloomberg Terminal. This move aims to broaden institutional availability to standardized GPU pricing. Ornn AI Inc. is a company based in New York and is focused on creating the financial framework to support the era of AI. The announcement was made on April 2, 2026, marking a significant development in institutional access to GPU pricing information.

data.title: Publicis Groupe's purchase of 160over90 shakes up sports marketing with 160 acquisition.
data.description: Yesterday, it was reported that the stock market experienced a significant drop, with the S&P 500 falling by over 3% and the Dow Jones Industrial Average losing more than 600 points. This decline was attributed to concerns over rising inflation and interest rates, as well as uncertainty surrounding global trade tensions. The tech-heavy Nasdaq also saw a notable decrease, closing down by nearly 4%. Investors are closely monitoring these developments amid fears of a potential economic downturn.Experts are advising caution and diversification in portfolios to mitigate risks in the current market climate.
Equity raised, total voting rights disclosed.

data.title: Northern Technologies International Corporation to Announce Fiscal 2026 Second-Quarter Financial Results and Host Conference Call
data.description: On April 2, 2026, Northern Technologies International Corporation (NASDAQ: NTIC) informed that it anticipates unveiling its fiscal 2026 second-quarter financial outcomes on April 9, 2026, prior to the market opening. Interested individuals can access the news release on NTIC’s website (www.ntic.com).

data.title: Roper Technologies schedules first quarter 2026 financial results conference call
data.description: Roper Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROP) has declared that the financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026, ending on March 31, 2026, will be disclosed before the market opens on Thursday, April 23, 2026. An earnings call to review these results is set for 8:00 AM ET on Thursday, April 23, 2026. Interested individuals can join the call through webcast or by dialing +1 800-836-8184 (US/Canada) or +1 646-357-8785, using conference call ID 23216. Prior to the commencement of the call, webcast details and conference call materials will be accessible in the Investors segment of Roper’s website.

data.title: Wagner Acquires 9 Million Rezolve Ai Shares in Strong Vote of Confidence
data.description: Today, in New York, Rezolve Ai (NASDAQ: RZLV) revealed that DBLP Sea Cow Limited, linked to Chairman and CEO Dan Wagner, has raised its ownership in the company by purchasing 9 million shares. This move comes after the release of Rezolve Ai's latest earnings report.

data.title: Tvardi Therapeutics to Participate in the Raymond James Biotech Innovation Symposium
data.description: Tvardi Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company (NASDAQ: TVRD), will attend Raymond James Biotech Innovation Symposium in NYC on April 14, 2026. The company specializes in developing oral small molecule therapies targeting STAT3 to address inflammatory and proliferative diseases. Management will engage in individual investor meetings at the event.

data.title: Dorman Products, Inc. Names Kevin Olsen Chairman of The Board
data.description: In COLMAR, Pennsylvania, on April 2, 2026, Dorman Products, Inc., a prominent player in the motor vehicle aftermarket sector, revealed that Kevin Olsen, the current President and CEO, has been named as the Chairman of the Board. This decision came as the previous Chairman, Steven Berman, who held the position since 2011, will retain his role on the Board of Directors. Dorman Products, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol DORM.

data.title: Picard Medical / SynCardia COO to Deliver Keynote at Venture Café Phoenix During Arizona Tech Week
data.description: The upcoming keynote will showcase advancements in artificial heart technology, with a focus on providing greater access to women facing advanced heart failure. This event will delve into cutting-edge innovations and initiatives geared towards improving outcomes for individuals in need of cardiac support. Don't miss out on this opportunity to learn about the latest breakthroughs in artificial heart solutions and strategies to enhance care for women with advanced heart failure.
Fusion Fuel Highlights Fiscal Year 2025 Results and Business Progress of Majority-Owned Subsidiary Quality Industrial Corp.; Achieves 45.9% Year-Over-Year Revenue Growth to $16.3 Million

data.title: High Roller Technologies Regains Compliance with NYSE American Continued Listing Standards
data.description: In Las Vegas, Nevada on April 02, 2026, High Roller Technologies, Inc. ("High Roller") managing the acclaimed online casino brands High Roller and Fruta, disclosed that it was informed by NYSE American LLC that the Company has complied with all relevant continued listing criteria outlined in Part 10 of the NYSE American Company Guide. High Roller is listed on the NYSE under the symbol ROLR.
